priority_notes: latest_update.md is authoritative for active copy and placement
platform_specs.txt controls final size and safe areas

style.typography: geometric sans headline with readable UI sans body

layout_requirements.cta_position: lower-left safe area aligned to copy column
layout_requirements.alignment: copy and CTA share a consistent left edge

hero_visual_requirements: cards, columns, or weekly lanes visible
current week or focus-state cue visible
product interface cue visible without a crowded analytics dashboard

forbidden_examples: ship every roadmap twice as fast
